properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Take a picture put it in a dark room There's a process for it to go through Take it out when the process is completed See the beauty before You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That's how it is with this life here on earth The shot was taken from another world Earth is the dark room where our lives develop Soon our true beauty will unfold

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In a better world, a better place, a better life In a better way, with better things In eternity that's where we'd be With the One who died for you and me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Here we see trees struggling to live But there's a place where they don't Here we see sickness and dying There's a place where we won't

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We've got no future on this sinful earth Our eyes are fixed on another world We've got no treasure here below But there is a place where they are stored

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: In this place we're pilgrims and strangers But there's a place where we belong Soon we'll leave Satan's Eden Take courage pilgrims it won't be long

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Down here we have no continuing city But we see the One to come We desire that heavenly country God has prepared our future home
